mapper.sql: id, order_sn, member_id, receiver_name, receiver_phone, receiver_address, total_amount, pay_amount, freight_amount, promotion_amount, status, payment_type, payment_time, delivery_time, receive_time, remark, version, create_time, update_time
mapper.select: SELECT FROM `order` ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT FROM `order` WHERE member_id = #{memberId} ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT FROM `order` WHERE status = #{status} ORDER BY create_time DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO `order` ( order_sn, member_id, receiver_name, receiver_phone, receiver_address, total_amount, pay_amount, freight_amount, promotion_amount, status, payment_type, payment_time, delivery_time, receive_time, remark, version, create_time, update_time ) VALUES ( #{orderSn}, #{memberId}, #{receiverName}, #{receiverPhone}, #{receiverAddress}, #{totalAmount}, #{payAmount}, #{freightAmount}, #{promotionAmount}, #{status}, #{paymentType}, #{paymentTime}, #{deliveryTime}, #{receiveTime}, #{remark}, #{version}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime} )
mapper.update: UPDATE `order` SET status = 1, payment_type = #{paymentType}, payment_time = #{paymentTime}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE `order` SET status = 2, delivery_time = #{deliveryTime}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE `order` SET status = 3, receive_time = #{receiveTime}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE `order` SET status = 4, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
